mnemonics: Make Every Decision A Tree Learns Easily
Most Intelligent Computers Acquire New Expertise
keyPoints: Decision Trees are a type of Supervised Learning algorithm
Decision Trees are used for both Classification and Regression problems
Root Node is the starting point of the Decision Tree
Each Node represents a feature or attribute used to make predictions
Leaf Node represents the predicted class or target value
Decision Trees can be used for both Continuous and Categorical features
